title: China's Xi invokes 'threat' of Taiwan independence in first cross-strait opposition talks in a decade
summary: Xi Jinping hosted Taiwan's main opposition leader in Beijing for the first time in a decade, ahead of a high-stakes meeting with Trump in May and Taiwan's presidential election in 2028.
